title: hieracium murorum subsp. pseudovalifolium
intro: Hieracium murorum subsp. pseudovalifolium, commonly known as Hawkweed or False Valerian-leaved Hawkweed, is a subspecies of the Hieracium murorum plant, belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. It is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
